title: Silver certificate
doc_html:
§1206.  Silver certificate

The board may issue a silver certificate for twenty-five continuous years of registration.

Added by Acts 1956, No. 272, §1; Acts 1999, No. 767, §1.

§1206.  Silver certificate
The board may issue a silver certificate for twenty-five continuous years of registration.
Added by Acts 1956, No. 272, §1; Acts 1999, No. 767, §1.
